items.name: FontConfig
items.comment: Font appearance shared by lyric lines and their annotation sub-lines.

fields.name: family
fields.comment: Font family name; empty uses the platform default.

fields.name: size
comment: Font size of the lyric lines.
A `%` value is relative to the parent line's font size (e.g. translation / background lines).

items.name: StyleConfig
items.comment: Visual style for a single render state.

fields.name: opacity
fields.comment: Opacity of the render state in the [0, 1] range; 1 is fully opaque.

items.name: StateStyleConfig
items.comment: Inactive and active styles shared by normal lyric lines and their annotation sub-lines.
